items.prompt_text: 4 CCSS.ELA-Literacy.RL.3.5 CCSS.ELA-Literacy.RL.3.3 Writing to Sources Writing to Sources 0.96 1.52 0.48 0.38 *This item map is intended to identify the primary analytic skills necessary to successfully answer each question. However, each constructed-response question measures proficiencies described in multiple standards, including writing and additional reading and language standards. For example, two point and four point constructed-response questions require students to first conduct the analyses described in the mapped standard and then produce written responses that are rated based on writing standards. To gain greater insight into the measurement focus for constructed-response questions please refer to the rubrics shown in the Educator Guides.
